story_de: Sandra war die erste «nicht-menschliche Person» der Rechtsgeschichte — anerkannt 2014 in Argentinien.
story_en: With this room we honour Sandra — an orangutan who in 2014 became the world's first being recognised as a «non-human person» by an Argentine court. A milestone in animal rights history.
description_de: Der große Hauptsaal mit 300 Sitzplätzen und Bühne.
description_en: The main auditorium with 300 seats and a stage.
